records.ety: [OF. wastel, gastel, F. gteau, LL. wastellus, fr. MHG. wastel a kind of bread; cf. OHG. & AS. wist food.]

defs: A kind of white and fine bread or cake; -- called also wastel bread, and wastel cake.
quotes: Roasted flesh or milk and wasted bread.
The simnel bread and wastel cakes, which were only used at the tables of the highest nobility.
